Review

Some review from our guests

Cengkareng Transit Hotel is located 15 minutes away from Bandara Internasional Soekarno Hatta. Clean and comfortable rooms, attentive staff, good food and amazing service. There are 48 rooms, free shuttle service, WiFi, and 24-hour room service ready to support your trip.

Cengkareng Transit Hotel, a perfect solution and smart choice for transit travellers.
